ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 10:00 AM – 11:30 AM
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a reminder that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance from 10:00 AM to 11:30 AM tomorrow (March 15, 2026). During this window, VPN connectivity will be unavailable.

If you rely on remote access, please plan accordingly and log off before 10:00 AM. Should you encounter any issues post‑maintenance, contact the IT help desk at 1‑800‑555‑0199.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

IT Operations

spam.subject: Action Required: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected that your Microsoft 365 password is set to expire in 24 hours. To avoid service interruption, you must reset your password immediately.

Please click the link below to reset your password: <URL>

If you do not reset your password in time, your account will be disabled automatically. Failure to comply may result in loss of access to critical business applications.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,

Microsoft Security Team
